# 4.4. Are there any discrepancies between results reported in figures, tables, and text? <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
if(file.exists("../_setup.R")){source("../_setup.R")}
```

Check for contradictions where the same results appear in multiple places (figures, tables, main text, abstract).
